header.headline: IR Dataflow Stitching
header.subtitle: Each graph op points to the previous result, and memory planning binds those edges into runtime pointers.

norm.title: attn_norm
norm.body: Normalize the incoming state and publish x_norm.

proj.title: qkv_proj
proj.body: Project from x_norm into QKV tensors using upstream op ids.

rope.title: rope_qk
rope.body: Apply positional mixing while preserving explicit source references.

planner.title: Memory Planner
planner.body: Assign buffers to every edge before lowering replaces ids with pointers.

lowered.title: Lowered IR
lowered.body: The stitched graph becomes concrete call arguments for codegen.

footer.note: Stitching is the handoff from symbolic op ids to deterministic runtime memory.
